headline: Cencora (COR) Emerges as a Healthcare Leader with Robust Fundamentals and Strategic Re-Rating
summary: Latitude Investment Management, an investment management firm, released its fourth-quarter 2025 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The letter emphasizes a long-term, fundamentals-driven investment philosophy, arguing that while stock prices can be volatile in the short run, they ultimately follow underlying earnings growth—illustrated through the “dog and owner” analogy.
